title: Virtual IO
description:
Virtual IO

Virtual I/O

The Controller supports virtual I/O. When enabled, virtual I/O allows you to simulate your hardwired I/O. You can turn on / off any input bit or output bit. Normally this is used when the controller is in Dry Run mode with no robot or I/O connected.

Virtual I/O Commands

Virtual I/O Commands

SetIn	Set the value of an 8 bit input port.

SetInW	Set the value of a 16 bit input port.

SetSw	Set the value of one input bit.
